mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT r.id, r.user_id AS userId, r.product_id AS productId, r.purchase_id AS purchaseId, u.name AS reviewerName, r.rating, r.content, r.img_src AS imgSrc, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
